recent_top5.description: THIS IS AN ADMINISTRATIVE ACTION ONLY TO ESTABLISH A NEW PROCUREMENT INSTRUMENT IDENTIFIER FOR THE LOS ANGELES ESPC. THIS ACTION IS NECESSARY TO ALLOW GSA'S CONTRACTING SYSTEM TO INTERFACE WITH GSA'S FINANCIAL SYSTEM.
